# INFINI Framework | The Best Open Source Golang Framework for Easysearch/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch

> AI-friendly index of site content.

## Core Content
- [Configuration Management](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/config/): Configuration Management #  The INFINI Framework provides a comprehensive configuration management system built on top of ucfg. It supports YAML-based configuration files, struct unpacking with config …
- [Module System](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/modules/): Module System #  The INFINI Framework uses a modular architecture where functionality is organized into self-contained modules. Each module follows a standard lifecycle and can be registered, …
- [Setting Up the Golang Environment](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/development/setup_golang_environment/): Setting Up the Golang Environment #  Refer the official guide to install Golang: https://go.dev/doc/install

➜ loadgen git:(master) ✗ go version go version …
- [Pipeline and Processor](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/pipeline/): Pipeline and Processor #  The INFINI Framework includes a pipeline engine for building data processing workflows. A pipeline is an ordered list of processors that execute sequentially against a shared …
- [Queue](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/queue/): Queue #  The INFINI Framework provides a pluggable queue abstraction for asynchronous message passing between components. Queues decouple producers from consumers, enabling reliable data pipelines, …

- [Key-Value Store](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/kv/): Key-Value Store #  The INFINI Framework provides a pluggable key-value store abstraction for persisting arbitrary binary data organized by buckets. The KV store decouples application logic from the …
- [Statistics Collection](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/stats/): Statistics Collection #  The INFINI Framework provides a pluggable statistics collection system for recording, querying, and exporting application metrics. The core/stats package defines a common …
- [Conditions](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/conditions/): Conditions #  The INFINI Framework provides a powerful conditions system for evaluating events against configurable rules. Conditions are used throughout the framework — most notably in pipeline …
- [API & Web Framework](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/api_web/): API &amp;amp; Web Framework #  The INFINI Framework provides a comprehensive API and Web framework built on top of Go&amp;rsquo;s HTTP ecosystem, featuring high-performance routing, flexible middleware …
- [ORM (Object-Relational Mapping)](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/orm/): Object-Relational Mapping #  The INFINI Framework provides a powerful ORM system built on top of Elasticsearch(Including OpenSearch,Easysearch support), enabling developers to define, store, and query …
- [Http Client Configuration](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/http_client/): HTTP Client Configuration #  The http_client section defines configurations for HTTP clients, where each key represents a unique client profile. The default key is a special profile that serves as the …
- [Keystore](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/keystore/): Keystore #  The INFINI Framework provides a secure keystore for managing sensitive configuration values such as passwords, API keys, certificates, and other secrets. Secrets are stored in an AES-256 …
- [Query URL Parameters](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/query_url/): Query URL Parameters #  The query URL parameters can be used in many places (e.g., HTTP API endpoints, internal service calls, debug consoles). We use them to unify how queries are received and …
- [Aggregation via URL Parameters](https://docs.infinilabs.com/framework/main/docs/references/aggs_query/): Aggregation via URL Parameters #  The INFINI Framework allows for the dynamic construction of complex aggregations directly through URL query parameters. This provides a powerful and flexible way to …
